title: ccdl2deltalake Mapping Tree
description: Ontology tree used by MappingContext to expand a concept code to its descendant codes (IN-clause broadening). Array of modules, one per context/coding-system combination.

key.description: Code value that identifies this node within the module's coding system

parents.description: Keys of direct parent nodes (empty for root concepts)

children.description: Keys of direct child nodes (empty for leaf concepts)

context.description: CCDL context this module belongs to (e.g. 'Diagnose')

system.description: Coding system URI for all keys/parents/children in this module (e.g. 'http://snomed.info/sct')

version.description: Optional version of the coding system covered by this module

entries.description: Flat list of all nodes in the ontology subtree covered by this module
